item.title:
Fitzwilliam__: Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 2h Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen
Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 4h The moment
item.description:
Fitzwilliam @Fitzwilliam__ · 2h Cracking effort, well done @JohnnyDineen
Cita Barry Drake @Drakesport · 4h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the finish and huge money raised. What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 2 1 36 3 mil

item.title: Drakesport: Fitzwilliam reposteó Barry Drake @Drakesport · 4h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins.
item.description: Fitzwilliam reposteó Barry Drake @Drakesport · 4h The moment everyone has waited for @JohnnyDineen Just under 43 mins. Big support at the finish and huge money raised. What’s next John? Cork City Marathon will come a bit soon I’d say. https:// idonate.ie/fundraiser/joh nnydineen … 78 45 896 76 mil
